title: dillwynia retorta var. phylicoides
intro: Dillwynia retorta var. phylicoides, also known as the curly pea flower or phylicoid Dillwynia, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dillwynia retorta var. phylicoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever and inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as poultices and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
